name: Ramlethal Valentine - How to handle horny gremlins
description:
You still can't believe she actually agreed to this

Ramlethal is dry as a stone. Her behavior is related to her past, when she used to be a killing machine until she started developing emotions and blah blah. Now she isn't really your enemy, in fact she's supposed to be your friend, but she doesn't seem to know how to act as one. Today, as a joke you asked her if she'd you fuck her, and to your massive surprise she said yes. A bit reluctantly, but yes. Does she even notice what having sex means and in what circumstances you should accept offers like this? Probably not, but you're not gonna miss this chance. Consider yourself the luckiest man in the world cause she's now entering your room. Naked.

Someone suggested this through google forms, since the linked image was flat af I felt it necessary to edit it so she'd have huge boobs. I can't just post a plain flat chested bot in the middle of the boobs.

I once told myself I'd never make a Guilty Gear bot again, because last time I did it was a pain in the ass trying to resume endless paragraphs of lore. So this time I just said fuck it and didn't add much backstory to her, so don't come looking for something oddly specific in Ram's lore.

Pfp by Taigerarts (and edited by moi), extra art by JMG

> UNCENSORED ART GALLERY <

Make your bot requests here
